reasoning_messages.reasoning:
We have to remediate the audit rule to add -f option, ensuring consistency. The plan: Check if auditd uses augenrules or auditctl. But simpler: find files /etc/audit/audit.rules and /etc/audit/rules.d/*.rules. Remove any existing -f lines. Append '-f' at end of each file. Also ensure file exists. In audit.rules and each .rules file. The safest: Use sed to delete any line containing -f[-]*. Then append. We need read_file before modification. Use read_file to inspect each. Then write_file to modify. But we can't chain commands. We'll need repeat multiple commands.

Plan: For audit.rules: read_file to inspect. If file missing create empty file? Use run_cmd 'touch /etc/audit/audit.rules'? But we need to create only if missing. Could read_file first; if fail read_file will error. Let's just run 'touch /etc/audit/audit.rules' first ensures exists. Then read_file, run sed -i to delete -f lines, then write append. Use run_cmd 'sed -i "/-f[[:space:]]*/d" /etc/audit/audit.rules'. Then run_cmd 'echo "-f" >> /etc/audit/audit.rules'.

For rules.d: find *.rules. Use run_cmd 'ls /etc/audit/rules.d/*.rules' might fail if none. We can read_file each. Option: loop via reading file names? We cannot script loop easily. But since the requirement says use commands one at a time. We can do multiple runs for known files? But may not know names. Might just handle generic: run_cmd 'sed -i "/-f[[:space:]]*/d" /etc/audit/rules.d/*.rules' but shell will expand. That might be fine. To ensure creation: we need create immutable.rules if missing? Not necessary; we handle all .rules files that exist. If none, then nothing.

Alternatively, simpler: just modify audit.rules only. But requirement says if augenrules case, modify /etc/audit/rules.d/*.rules including immutable.rules. So maybe just apply to audit.rules and also /etc/audit/rules.d/immutable.rules: use run_cmd: touch /etc/audit/rules.d/immutable.rules to create. Then sed, append.

Thus plan: 1) touch audit.rules, 2) sed remove, 3) echo -f, 4) touch immutable.rules, 5) sed remove,6) echo -f.

Also need to ensure restart auditd? Not necessary.

Now step: Must submit plan via review_plan and get approval. We'll give plan description.
